title: A Walk Through Yosemite
description: Captured this beautiful sunset after a 4-hour hike.
backstory: This shot was taken near Half Dome. We waited for 2 hours in the freezing cold until the sun hit the exact spot in the valley.

title: Neon Dreams
description: Cyberpunk vibes in the heart of Tokyo.
backstory: It was raining heavily night in Shinjuku. The reflections on the puddles created an incredible neon mirror. Shot on a 50mm f/1.8.

title: Serene Morning
description: The crisp morning air by the lake in Switzerland.
backstory: Just after sunrise. The lake was perfectly still, providing a flawless reflection of the Alps. Waited 3 days for the weather to clear up.

title: Market Chaos
description: Vibrant colors and beautiful chaos at a local market in Marrakech.
backstory: Navigating the souks is always an adventure. Finding a tiny sliver of light illuminating a spice stand was a magical moment.
